summary: 实现 Dispatcher + PermissionHandler question 分发与回复全链路

added: answer handler in handleCommand handlers table

reqMapping.REQ-008: _cmdAnswer 成功后 HTTP transport patch 卡片
reqMapping.REQ-010: _handlePermissionEvent 传统 permission 仍走 handle
reqMapping.REQ-011: _cmdAnswer 通过 driver.replyPermission 转发 TUI bridge
reqMapping.REQ-013: permission-handler handleQuestion 未知 inputMode warn

unchanged: handle() — 传统 permission 不受影响
handleReplied() — 传统 permission_replied 不受影响

message-dispatcher.test.js.added: 4 新 describe 组共 21 个测试用例
scenarios: _cmdAnswer: 缺少 questionId、缺少 formValue、required 空答案拒绝
_cmdAnswer: driver 不支持/无 session/driver 失败回滚
_cmdAnswer: HTTP transport patch / TUI bridge 不 patch
_handlePermissionEvent: question 分发 + questionReplyStates 预存
_handlePermissionEvent: 传统 permission 分发不变

permission-handler.test.js.created: 新文件，3 个 describe 组共 8 个测试用例
scenarios: handleQuestion: buildQuestionCard 渲染并 set permissionCardIds
handleQuestion: 已有 cardId 时 patchCard
handleQuestion: 未知 inputMode 记录 warn
handleQuestion: select 缺少 options 记录 warn
handleQuestionReplied: 无 cardId 不操作
handle: 传统 permission 用 buildPermissionCard
handleReplied: 传统 permission 用 buildPermissionRepliedCard
